name: Bob Amos Park
description: Bob Amos Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Pikeville, KY. There are 3 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Amenities include lights, restrooms, and water. The courts are free.

name: Pikeville Area Family YMCA
description: Pikeville Area Family YMCA is a place to play pickleball in Pikeville, KY. There are 4 indoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The facility includes amenities like food, restrooms, water, wheelchair accessibility, lights, and locker rooms. Reservations are not available. A membership is required to play.
